name: Flamon

signature_move.name: Baby Salamander
signature_move.description: 12Fires off an aura of flames.Flips through the air covered in fire.

description: A Digimon that was transformed into a half-beast, half-man form when Agnimon lost its power. It is missing the "Combat Instinct" that Digimon naturally possess, and moreover, it has lost power. However, it is a being that has inherited a Spirit of the legendary Ten Warriors who possess ultimate strength, so although it has lost power, ordinary Adult-class Digimon aren't a match for it. If anything, it has kindness inappropriate for a Digimon and is similar to a Child Digimon, counterbalancing its mischievous part. Its Special Move is firing off an aura of flames ( Baby Salamander ).
